chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No. S- 118 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For hearing of main case 04-09-2023 None present for the petitioner. Mr. J.K. Jarwar, Advocate for respondents No.6 to 8. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant A.G. ***** None present for the petitioner. Learned AAG submits that this petition has been filed for protection which has already been given to the petitioner by learned Additional Sessions Judge, Kandiaro vide order dated 22.12.2020 through application under Section 22-A & 22-B Cr.P.C. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of. JUDGE Ahmad
